creator: david@catwhisker.org
text:
Per the 20120531 entry in /usr/ports/UPDATING, I issued
	"portmaster -r png-" to update both graphics/png and
	everything that depends on it.

	After updating all of the ports on which qt33 depends, the
	attempt to re-build graphics/qt33 failed:

	...
	c++ -c -pipe -fno-exceptions -Wall -W -O2 -pipe -fno-strict-aliasing -fPIC -DQT_SHARED -DQT_TABLET_SUPPORT -DQT_NO_DEBUG -DQT_THREAD_SUPPORT -DPNG_DEPSTRUCT= -DQT_THREAD_SUPPORT -DQT_NO_CUPS -DQT_NO_NIS -D_LARGEFILE_SOURCE -D_LARGE_FILES -D_FILE_OFFSET_BITS=64 -DQT_NAS_SUPPORT -DQT_DLOPEN_OPENGL -DQT_BUILTIN_GIF_READER=1 -DQT_NO_STYLE_MAC -DQT_NO_STYLE_AQUA -DQT_NO_STYLE_INTERLACE -DQT_NO_STYLE_WINDOWSXP -DQT_NO_STYLE_COMPACT -DQT_NO_STYLE_POCKETPC -I../include -I/usr/local/share/qt/mkspecs/freebsd-g++ -I. -I/common/local/include/freetype2 -I3rdparty/opentype -I/common/local/include -I../include -I/common/local/include -I.moc/release-shared-mt/ -o .obj/release-shared-mt/qmngio.o kernel/qmngio.cpp
	In file included from /common/local/include/libmng_types.h:181,
			 from /common/local/include/libmng.h:386,
			 from kernel/qmngio.cpp:58:
	/common/local/include/lcms.h: In function 'void* _cmsMalloc(size_t)':
	/common/local/include/lcms.h:1418: warning: comparison of unsigned expression < 0 is always false
	c++ -c -pipe -fno-exceptions -Wall -W -O2 -pipe -fno-strict-aliasing -fPIC -DQT_SHARED -DQT_TABLET_SUPPORT -DQT_NO_DEBUG -DQT_THREAD_SUPPORT -DPNG_DEPSTRUCT= -DQT_THREAD_SUPPORT -DQT_NO_CUPS -DQT_NO_NIS -D_LARGEFILE_SOURCE -D_LARGE_FILES -D_FILE_OFFSET_BITS=64 -DQT_NAS_SUPPORT -DQT_DLOPEN_OPENGL -DQT_BUILTIN_GIF_READER=1 -DQT_NO_STYLE_MAC -DQT_NO_STYLE_AQUA -DQT_NO_STYLE_INTERLACE -DQT_NO_STYLE_WINDOWSXP -DQT_NO_STYLE_COMPACT -DQT_NO_STYLE_POCKETPC -I../include -I/usr/local/share/qt/mkspecs/freebsd-g++ -I. -I/common/local/include/freetype2 -I3rdparty/opentype -I/common/local/include -I../include -I/common/local/include -I.moc/release-shared-mt/ -o .obj/release-shared-mt/qjpegio.o kernel/qjpegio.cpp
	c++ -c -pipe -fno-exceptions -Wall -W -O2 -pipe -fno-strict-aliasing -fPIC -DQT_SHARED -DQT_TABLET_SUPPORT -DQT_NO_DEBUG -DQT_THREAD_SUPPORT -DPNG_DEPSTRUCT= -DQT_THREAD_SUPPORT -DQT_NO_CUPS -DQT_NO_NIS -D_LARGEFILE_SOURCE -D_LARGE_FILES -D_FILE_OFFSET_BITS=64 -DQT_NAS_SUPPORT -DQT_DLOPEN_OPENGL -DQT_BUILTIN_GIF_READER=1 -DQT_NO_STYLE_MAC -DQT_NO_STYLE_AQUA -DQT_NO_STYLE_INTERLACE -DQT_NO_STYLE_WINDOWSXP -DQT_NO_STYLE_COMPACT -DQT_NO_STYLE_POCKETPC -I../include -I/usr/local/share/qt/mkspecs/freebsd-g++ -I. -I/common/local/include/freetype2 -I3rdparty/opentype -I/common/local/include -I../include -I/common/local/include -I.moc/release-shared-mt/ -o .obj/release-shared-mt/qpngio.o kernel/qpngio.cpp

	/common/local/include/png.h:857: error: forward declaration of 'struct png_struct_def'
	kernel/qpngio.cpp: In function 'void qt_zlib_compression_hack()':

How-To-Repeat: 	As above.
